# Garvin Chanderia — Portfolio

> AI product strategist and enterprise architect based in Pune, India. Designs intelligent systems, leads EA engagements for manufacturing enterprises, and builds products that turn complexity into clarity.

## About
Garvin Chanderia is a Product Consultant specializing in Enterprise Architecture Platforms at Invecto Technologies (November 2025–present, Pune). He leads EA platform strategy using Avolution ABACUS, with a primary engagement at Bajaj Auto covering application portfolio rationalisation, KTM acquisition architecture assessment, and capability-to-technology traceability. Previously a Product Analyst at Cummins India (~1 year 10 months). Founded ThrottleApp, a motorcycle companion app with 300+ downloads. B.Tech Computer Engineering with AI/ML specialisation from MIT ADT University, Pune (2020–2024).

## Key Projects (by impact)

### EA Skill Engine
Production-grade LLM system for autonomous enterprise architecture discovery. Two-layer routing: base EA methodology (TOGAF, ArchiMate, Zachman) + platform-specific execution (Avolution ABACUS). Deployed at Bajaj Auto via Invecto Technologies. Reduced multi-week manual engagements to hours.
Stack: Python, Claude Skills, ArchiMate, Avolution ABACUS, OpenAI API

### n8n MCP Server
Custom TypeScript Model Context Protocol server enabling Claude to build, inspect, and deploy n8n workflows through natural language. Powers the PM Outreach Engine, Dental Revenue Engine, and Nightly Distillation workflow.
Stack: TypeScript, MCP, n8n REST API, Node.js

### BranClosr
Full-stack influencer marketing platform. 56 TypeScript modules, Next.js 16 App Router, Supabase/PostgreSQL with RLS. Deal cycles compressed from 30 days to 48 hours. Targeting D2C brands and mid-tier creators (10K-500K followers) in India.
Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, Zod

### ClawBoard
Centralised monitoring dashboard for autonomous agent health, LLM cost tracking across providers (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini), and workflow orchestration.
Stack: Figma, React, Python, n8n API

### ThrottleApp
Motorcycle companion app built from concept to 300+ organic downloads. Crash detection, live location sharing, automated trip logging. 200+ user interviews.
Stack: Flutter, Firebase, Mixpanel, Figma

### Dental Revenue Engine
Fully autonomous outreach pipeline. 100+ personalised clinic websites deployed on GitHub Pages for ~₹91 total cost. Lead discovery via Exa Neural Search, email sequencing via Himalaya CLI, reply monitoring via Telegram/iMessage.

## Certifications
Microsoft AI Product Management, Google UX Design, Google Data Analytics, Databricks Lakehouse Fundamentals, CUDA & GPU Computing, Product Analytics (Product School), Digital Product Management (Coursera)
